description: Instantiate the custom Gymnasium environment template (a grid-world CustomEnv) and validate it with SB3's check_env for structure and observation/action-space conformance.
rules: read-only — only instantiates an in-process env and writes the check report under record_store
wraps the vendored custom_env_template.py:CustomEnv unchanged and runs stable_baselines3.common.env_checker.check_env
GRID_SIZE controls the template grid-world size passed to CustomEnv
needs stable-baselines3 >= 2.8 (Python 3.10+) and gymnasium present to actually run check_env; degrades gracefully otherwise
usage: Set GRID_SIZE (positive int, e.g. 5). Output: check_env.json (validation status + any check_env warnings/errors).
limitation: Validates the bundled template CustomEnv only; adapt the vendored custom_env_template.py for a different env. Heavy science libs and Python 3.10+ are required to validate; without them the porter records the libs are absent and writes an empty-but-present report.
